documentation.description: The EL.Beans.Factory package is a registry for the creation of request, session and application beans.

simple_types.name: Scope_Type
simple_types.code:
type Scope_Type is
  (
   APPLICATION_SCOPE,
   SESSION_SCOPE,
   REQUEST_SCOPE,
   ANY_SCOPE);

enumeration_literals.name: APPLICATION_SCOPE
enumeration_literals.description: Session scope means the bean is created one for each session.

enumeration_literals.name: SESSION_SCOPE
enumeration_literals.description: Request scope means the bean is created for each request

tagged_types.name: Bean_Definition
Simple_Binding
tagged_types.code: type Simple_Binding is new Binding with private;

access_types.name: Bean_Definition_Access
access_types.code: type Bean_Definition_Access is access constant Bean_Definition'Class;

access_types.name: Binding_Access
access_types.code: type Binding_Access is access all Binding'Class;

subprograms.name: Create
subprograms.code:
function Create (Def : in Bean_Definition)
                 return Util.Beans.Basic.Readonly_Bean_Access

subprograms.name: Create
Create
Create
Destroy
subprograms.code:
procedure Destroy (Def  : in Bean_Definition;
                   Bean : in out Util.Beans.Basic.Readonly_Bean_Access)

subprograms.name: Register
Register
Register
subprograms.code:
procedure Register (Factory : in out Bean_Factory;
                    From    : in Bean_Factory)
